problem_id: AI-Based Tender Evaluation and Eligibility Analysis for Government Procurement
team_name: Scan to Score — AI-Powered Tender Evaluation Platform for Government Procurement
summary: Design a technical platform that, given a tender document and a set of bidder submissions, can understand the tender, understand each bidder, evaluate eligibility, and produce explainable evaluation reports for government procurement officers.
optimization_claims: Reducing evaluation time from days to a review-and-approve workflow.
Ensuring no silent disqualification of bidders.
